---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or enhancement for Firstline
title: "feat: "
labels: ["enhancement", "triage"]
assignees: ""
---

## Problem / motivation

What problem are you trying to solve? Is it related to a specific breach-response workflow or pain
point? A clear and concise description of the need.

## Proposed solution

What you'd like to happen. Describe the feature or behavior you have in mind.

## Alternatives considered

Any alternative solutions or workarounds you've considered.

## Scope

- Edition(s) affected: <!-- Cloudflare Worker / FastAPI + EKS / both -->
- Component(s): <!-- apps/api, apps/web, apps/cloudflare, infra, docs -->

## Additional context

Mockups, links, references, or any other context that would help.
